package.name: nav_goal_go2w_localization
package.description: Scan-to-map localization against a pre-built PCD map. Registers live (deskewed, odom-frame) LiDAR clouds with small_gicp GICP/VGICP seeded by D-LIO odometry, gates the result (inliers, residual, jump consistency), and broadcasts the map->odom TF. Health state machine: UNINITIALIZED/CONVERGING/TRACKING/DEGRADED/LOST on /localization/state.
